markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the new content calendar and discuss the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Calendar Live:** The Airtable "Content OS" is live with 106 topics for review. Hex will approve topics based on alignment with product use cases and brand POV.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**BI Content Strategy:** BI topics will be reframed to align with Hex's "redefining BI" POV. The strategy is to meet search intent with standard SEO structure while embedding a unique perspective in the content.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [**LLM Tracking:** GrowthX is using Scrunch for synthetic LLM monitoring. A separate Looker dashboard for real GA4 traffic is deemed unreliable by Hex due to suspected bot activity and high "not set" traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
  - [**Topic Review Process:** Hex will review the 106 topics, commenting directly in Airtable. Existing content will be refreshed and optimized, not replaced.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)

## Topics

### Competitor Analysis Update

  - [Aida Knezevic presented an updated analysis of Tableau's content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [**Key Findings:**](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
      - [\~30% of content focuses on business intelligence and analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
      - [AI-related content is weak.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
      - [\~70% covers data visualization techniques (e.g., Sankey diagrams) and product how-tos.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [**Recommendation:** Hex should focus on competing against two non-Hex competitors (e.g., "Tableau vs. Power BI") to capture traffic without cannibalizing its own pages.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Content Calendar & Topic Review

  - [The "Content OS" Airtable is live, containing 106 topic assignments.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**Airtable Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [**Topic Clusters:** High-level overview of target themes.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [**URL Tab:** Keyword gap analysis (44k keywords) grouped by competitor URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
      - [**Client Views:**](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
          - [`Blog Ideas`: For Hex review and approval.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
          - [`Drafts`: For in-progress content.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
          - [`Published Blogs`: For live content.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [**Review Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [Hex to review topics, commenting directly in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [Prioritize topics that align with strong Hex use cases, product functionality, or customer stories.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [GrowthX will refresh existing content (e.g., the cohort analysis tutorial) by adding new sections and optimizing for SEO, rather than creating new, competing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)

### BI Content Strategy

  - [**Challenge:** How to create BI content that meets search intent without conflicting with Hex's "redefining BI" POV, which contrasts with traditional BI tools.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [**Solution:** Embed Hex's unique perspective within a standard SEO structure.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [**Title:** Must match search intent (e.g., "What is Cohort Analysis?").](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
      - [**Content:** Can include a unique POV (e.g., "Why traditional cohort analysis is flawed and how Hex approaches it").](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This approach allows Hex to build authority in the BI space while differentiating its brand.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)

### LLM Visibility Tracking

  - [**Scrunch (Synthetic Monitoring):**](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [Simulates user prompts to track Hex's appearance in LLM responses.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
      - [Current citation rate is \~4%, which is typical for a site of Hex's size.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
      - [GrowthX can add more prompts based on Hex's customer conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard (Real Traffic):**](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
      - [Combines data from Search Console and GA4 to show actual LLM referral traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
      - [**Problem:** Hex finds GA4 data unreliable due to suspected bot activity and a high volume of "not set" traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
      - [**Context:** GrowthX confirmed this is a common GA4 issue.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [**Meridian:** Hex recently onboarded Meridian for LLM tracking. The teams will compare platforms in a future meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Hex Team:** Review the 106 topics in the Airtable "Content OS" and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [**Hex Team:** Discuss internally to align on the BI content strategy and topic assignments.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Share the current list of prompts used in Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [**All:** Schedule a follow-up to compare Scrunch and Meridian platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/d8HzzK7sxQLJG7pCUp2AiKUY_uoLPhA8?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
